title: Reject all-zero X25519 shared secrets in EDHOC
description: Trigger: a peer sends a small-order X25519 public key in EDHOC message_2 or message_1. lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c computes g_xy at lines 527 and 882 and feeds it into HKDF without checking for the all-zero shared secret, despite having is_all_zeros() available. Impact: violates RFC 7748 contributory behavior checks and can put attacker-controlled predictable input into the EDHOC key schedule. Reject all-zero shared secrets before deriving PRK material.
close_reason: Implemented fixes in assigned subagents and ran available focused checks; full Zephyr builds remain blocked by existing workspace/module setup issues.
